variables.notes: R:c. The selected XSGA bucket consists of Personnel costs, Other external costs, and Other Operating Expenses, and the D&A line is presented separately at the same level, so it is likely outside those rows. But the statement does not show an SG&A-specific D&A split, and XRD is empty. Because the visible D&A is an aggregate operating line rather than clearly attributable to SG&A, conservative treatment is to leave XSGA_DA empty pending manual review.
